zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey於1166年出生在英國英格蘭素可列維斯時，他的父親Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey37歲，母親Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey-94歲。他於1225年10月13日與Maud Matilda Marshall結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1240年5月27日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年74歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey于1166年出生在英国英格兰素可列維斯时，他的父亲Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey37岁，母亲Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey-94岁。他于1225年10月13日与Maud Matilda Marshall结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1240年5月27日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年74岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯列維斯 聖 約翰 維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey was born in 1166, in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey, was 37 and his mother, Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey, was -94. He married Maud Matilda Marshall on 13 October 1225. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 27 May 1240, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey est né en 1166, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey, avait -94 ans. Il a épousé Maud Matilda Marshall le 13 octobre 1225. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1240, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey 1166 in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey 37 und seine Mutter Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey -94. Er hat am 13. Oktober 1225 Maud Matilda Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1240 im Alter von 74 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey è nato il nel 1166 nel Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey, aveva -94 anni. Lui sposato Maud Matilda Marshall il 13 ottobre 1225. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 maggio 1240, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surreyが1166年にイギリスイギリススセックスルスで生まれた時，父Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surreyは37歳，母Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surreyは-94歳であった。1225年10月13日にMaud Matilda Marshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1240年5月27日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで74歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスルス スト ジョン ウィソウトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey(이)가 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey(은)는 -94세였다. 그는 1225년 10월 13일 Maud Matilda Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 5월 27일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스 루스 스트 존 위토우트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey nasceu em 1166, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey, tinha -94 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Matilda Marshall em 13 de outubro de 1225. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1240, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes St John Without, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Warenne 5th Earl of Surrey родился в 1166 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hamelin de Warenne 4th Earl of Surrey было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey, -94. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Matilda Marshall 13 октября 1225 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 мая 1240 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь ст джон витоут, львесь, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Maud Matilda Marshall el 13 de octubre de 1225. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
